lesson.menu_desc: Review Block 1 -- Your Polished Self-Introduction -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Executive Introduction Mastery -- Review Block 1
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Diogo Leal | Aula 6 -- Executive Introduction Mastery

listenings.text: Hi Diogo, this is Sophia from the Oracle leadership forum. Thank you for connecting with me last week. I am calling because we have a panel of new partners next Friday, and I would love for you to introduce yourself to the group. Please keep it short and confident. Tell them your role, one strong project, and what you are passionate about. A concise, memorable introduction always builds good rapport. If you can, highlight your work with international teams. I am sure you will do great. Send me a message when you are ready, and we will talk about the details. Talk to you soon.

Hello, everyone. My name is Diogo Leal, and it is a pleasure to meet you. I am an IT project manager at Oracle, here in Sao Paulo. I have worked in technology for more than ten years, and I usually lead teams across different countries. My main strength is turning a complex problem into a simple plan. Right now, I am managing a project that connects our offices in three regions. I am passionate about technology that helps people work better together. I would love to learn about your projects too. Thank you for your time, and I hope we can stay in touch.

extra_audio.text: Diogo opens his notes and writes his role at Oracle. He chooses one strong project to highlight. He practices a short and concise introduction. He records his pitch with a confident voice. Finally, he meets the group and builds a friendly rapport.
